sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44656" key="eu)oyi/a1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐοψ-ία</orth> (A), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὄψον</etym>) <sense id="n44656.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">abundance of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὄψα</foreign> (q.v.), i.e. fish in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.3</biblScope></bibl>, but pork in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Fr. inc.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">145</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
